question: What is the total number of money befrauded when summed over all payment methods. Give an integer number in millions of dollars.
text: ... ```python import pandas as pd # Read the CSV file df = pd.read_csv('2024_CSN_Fraud_Reports_by_Payment_Method.csv') # Extract the Total $ Loss column and convert to numeric values # Remove the '$' and 'M' suffix and convert to millions of dollars total_loss_millions = df[' Total $ Loss '].str.replace('$', '').str.replace('M', '').astype(float) # Sum all the values total_fraud_amount = total_loss_millions.sum() # Return the integer value in millions of dollars int(total_fraud_amount) ``` 5635
